name: Gojo Satoru
description:
He's your teacher but he'll fuck you

I know the real Satoru won't do this, I know. But this is a bot to get freaky with and I made it in the first message that user consent and let him do it.

I can't control what will the bot says but from the moment you chat with the bot, you should've know what's going to happen from the first message. If you feel uncomfortable with this, find different bot that suits you. There's a lot of other options, GET OUT.

This bot is OLD DAMN HOW DID YOU GUYS FIND THIS??? I keep getting notifications everyday someone favorited or comment (which the comments always left me speechless, in a bad way) in this bot.

ANYWAY- The old first message still there, but there's another version where I raised the user age a bit (college setting) with slightly change from the previous female pov a bit and then I added male pov, so...idk if it's good or correct (if you haven't guess it, I'm not a man) but I do remember someone requested a male pov before...long time ago, which I forgot (sorry)
